allow: Bash(cmd /c "npx esbuild server/_core/vercel.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=api/index.js --external:pg-native --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate 2>&1 && npx vite build 2>&1")

Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "try { const m = require\(''''./api/index.js''''\); console.log\(''''loaded, type:'''', typeof m\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''''ERR:'''', e.code, e.message.substring\(0,100\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "import\(''''./api/index.js''''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''''keys:'''', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''''default type:'''', typeof m.default\); }\).catch\(e => console.log\(''''ERR:'''', e.code, e.message.substring\(0, 100\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''''./api/index.js''''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''''keys:'''', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''''default type:'''', typeof m.default\); console.log\(''''default.listen?'''', typeof \(m.default && m.default.listen\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.log\(''''ERR:'''', e.code, e.message.substring\(0,100\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''''./api/index.js''''\).then\(m => { const app = m.default; console.log\(''''app type:'''', typeof app\); console.log\(''''app.default type:'''', typeof app.default\); console.log\(''''app.default.listen?'''', typeof \(app.default && app.default.listen\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.log\(''''ERR:'''', e.message\)\)")

Bash(cmd /c "git add dist/api/index.js dist/public client/src/components/ProfileHeroCard.tsx server/_core/activityRoutes.ts && git commit -m ""fix: profile photo Google URL proxy + activity logs team_id fallback"" && git push origin master 2>&1")

Bash(cmd /c "git add server/_core/aiRoutes.ts client/src/components/CampaignMessageSurvey.tsx client/src/components/AISurveyModal.tsx dist/api/index.js dist/public/ 2>&1 && git commit -m ""feat: auto-detect gender from LinkedIn name, show sender profile in survey"" 2>&1")
